verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm in the way, The bright and shining way, I'm in the glory-land way; Telling the world That Jesus saves today, Yes, I'm in the glory-land way.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm in the glory-land way I'm in the glory-land way; Heaven is nearer, And the way groweth clearer, For I'm in the glory-land way.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: List to the call, The gospel call today, Get in the glory-land way; Wand'rers, come home, Oh, hasten to obey, And get in the glory-land way.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Onward I go, Rejoicing in His love, I'm in the glory-land way; Soon I shall see Him In that home above, Oh, I'm in the glory-land way.
